rationale: The cited paper appears to be a core prior WOM-antecedent study: it analyzes product-level drivers of WOM (interest, cues, visibility) with large observational data plus field/lab experiments. The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior WOM antecedent research and studies closely related constructs (e.g., visibility/relevance, drivers of WOM volume across channels), so this is plausibly substantive rather than incidental.
